ensure.action: Re-run START-HERE-SysAdminSuite-Dashboard.bat and approve the update when prompted.

statusHints.available: A newer clean main or package is available. The dashboard does not update itself; approve the launcher prompt when ready.
statusHints.manual_review: The update helper found a state that needs human review. Keep using the current copy until IT reviews it.

ensure.action: Install Git for Windows or use the packaged dashboard field release.
ensure.note: Git Bash is a launcher-side hard gate.

statusHints.missing: Git Bash is required before the Bash-first dashboard bootstrap can run.
CMD is expected on Windows and is used by field launchers.
Windows PowerShell is expected on Windows and is used by the update helper.

ensure.note: Managed install via approved sources manifest.

statusHints.missing: PowerShell 7 is recommended for Windows app management workflows.
statusHints.outdated: PowerShell 7 is present but below the pinned manifest version.

ensure.note: Managed install via approved sources manifest.

statusHints.missing: Python is required for several local parsers and probe helpers.
statusHints.outdated: Python is present but below the pinned manifest version.

statusHints.missing: The dashboard host needs the ASP.NET Core runtime.
statusHints.outdated: The ASP.NET Core runtime is present but below the pinned Microsoft release.

statusHints.missing: The Windows tray dashboard host needs the Windows Desktop runtime.
statusHints.outdated: The Windows Desktop runtime is present but below the pinned Microsoft release.

statusHints.missing: Source checkouts need the SDK to publish the dashboard host; field releases do not.
statusHints.outdated: The SDK is present but below the pinned Microsoft release.

statusHints.missing: The host executable was not found. Re-run the launcher so it can prepare or locate the host.
naabu is used for authorized reachability validation only. Install it with the suite wrapper.
statusHints.outdated: naabu is present but below the profile pin.

ensure.action: Install nmap manually per docs/NAABU_CYBERNET_PROFILES.md. No auto-download on Northwell workstations.

statusHints.missing: nmap is detect-and-guide only on Northwell workstations; install manually when that workflow requires it.

ensure.note: Bundled with Git for Windows. Install or repair Git Bash if missing.
